markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Deep dive into Outreach's product architecture, positioning, and AI capabilities with Adam Harris and Jeremy Moskowitz from Outreach.](https://fathom.video/share/ApJiiHCUK6m12cvELmMJ85G9QW8sT4eh?tab=summary&timestamp=5.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Outreach consolidates multiple point solutions (sales engagement, conversation intelligence, forecasting/revenue intelligence, AI agents) into a unified revenue action orchestration platform](https://fathom.video/share/ApJiiHCUK6m12cvELmMJ85G9QW8sT4eh?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)
  - [The platform is built on a comprehensive data cloud architecture, integrating first-party engagement data, CRM data, and third-party data sources](https://fathom.video/share/ApJiiHCUK6m12cvELmMJ85G9QW8sT4eh?tab=summary&timestamp=456.0)
  - [Outreach is shifting focus from SDR/BDR teams to targeting executive sales leadership and expanding use cases across the full revenue lifecycle](https://fathom.video/share/ApJiiHCUK6m12cvELmMJ85G9QW8sT4eh?tab=summary&timestamp=1524.0)
  - [AI is integrated throughout workflows, with flexible deployment options (autopilot vs. co-pilot) based on customer needs and segments](https://fathom.video/share/ApJiiHCUK6m12cvELmMJ85G9QW8sT4eh?tab=summary&timestamp=1660.0)

## Topics

### Product Architecture and Philosophy

  - [Five core modules/workflows: Forecasting & Planning, Coach Teams, Manage Deals, Prospect & Engage Accounts, Retain & Expand](https://fathom.video/share/ApJiiHCUK6m12cvELmMJ85G9QW8sT4eh?tab=summary&timestamp=382.0)
  - [Data cloud architecture as foundation, integrating:](https://fathom.video/share/ApJiiHCUK6m12cvELmMJ85G9QW8sT4eh?tab=summary&timestamp=451.0)
      - [First-party engagement data (emails, calls, activities)](https://fathom.video/share/ApJiiHCUK6m12cvELmMJ85G9QW8sT4eh?tab=summary&timestamp=480.0)
      - [CRM data (Salesforce, Dynamics)](https://fathom.video/share/ApJiiHCUK6m12cvELmMJ85G9QW8sT4eh?tab=summary&timestamp=521.0)
      - [Data warehouse information (product usage, support tickets)](https://fathom.video/share/ApJiiHCUK6m12cvELmMJ85G9QW8sT4eh?tab=summary&timestamp=552.0)
      - [Third-party data (firmographic, demographic)](https://fathom.video/share/ApJiiHCUK6m12cvELmMJ85G9QW8sT4eh?tab=summary&timestamp=629.0)
  - [Automation layer applies rules to surface insights and recommend actions](https://fathom.video/share/ApJiiHCUK6m12cvELmMJ85G9QW8sT4eh?tab=summary&timestamp=666.0)
  - [AI integrated throughout to enhance workflows and decision-making](https://fathom.video/share/ApJiiHCUK6m12cvELmMJ85G9QW8sT4eh?tab=summary&timestamp=858.0)

### Consolidation of Point Solutions

  - [Sales Engagement: Prospecting, account management, deal management](https://fathom.video/share/ApJiiHCUK6m12cvELmMJ85G9QW8sT4eh?tab=summary&timestamp=970.0)
  - [Conversation Intelligence: Call/meeting analysis, coaching, trend identification](https://fathom.video/share/ApJiiHCUK6m12cvELmMJ85G9QW8sT4eh?tab=summary&timestamp=1099.0)
  - [Pipeline and Revenue Forecasting: Activity aggregation, deal health assessment](https://fathom.video/share/ApJiiHCUK6m12cvELmMJ85G9QW8sT4eh?tab=summary&timestamp=1203.0)
  - [AI Agents: Enhancing various workflows (e.g., lead list building, scoring)](https://fathom.video/share/ApJiiHCUK6m12cvELmMJ85G9QW8sT4eh?tab=summary&timestamp=1588.0)

### AI Implementation Strategy

  - [Flexible deployment between autopilot (AI agents) and co-pilot (AI assistants) modes](https://fathom.video/share/ApJiiHCUK6m12cvELmMJ85G9QW8sT4eh?tab=summary&timestamp=1660.0)
  - [Customizable based on customer appetite for AI autonomy and target segments](https://fathom.video/share/ApJiiHCUK6m12cvELmMJ85G9QW8sT4eh?tab=summary&timestamp=1676.0)
  - [Enterprise-grade security and compliance capabilities](https://fathom.video/share/ApJiiHCUK6m12cvELmMJ85G9QW8sT4eh?tab=summary&timestamp=1740.0)
  - [Granular control over AI feature activation](https://fathom.video/share/ApJiiHCUK6m12cvELmMJ85G9QW8sT4eh?tab=summary&timestamp=1747.0)

### Key Workflows and Use Cases

1.  Forecasting & Planning
      - [Pipeline inspection and management](https://fathom.video/share/ApJiiHCUK6m12cvELmMJ85G9QW8sT4eh?tab=summary&timestamp=1131.0)
      - [Revenue forecasting](https://fathom.video/share/ApJiiHCUK6m12cvELmMJ85G9QW8sT4eh?tab=summary&timestamp=1161.0)
      - [Planning and replanning](https://fathom.video/share/ApJiiHCUK6m12cvELmMJ85G9QW8sT4eh?tab=summary&timestamp=1214.0)
2.  Coach Teams
      - [Consistency in sales approach](https://fathom.video/share/ApJiiHCUK6m12cvELmMJ85G9QW8sT4eh?tab=summary&timestamp=1895.0)
      - [Rep productivity improvement](https://fathom.video/share/ApJiiHCUK6m12cvELmMJ85G9QW8sT4eh?tab=summary&timestamp=1880.0)
3.  Manage Deals
      - [Risk evaluation](https://fathom.video/share/ApJiiHCUK6m12cvELmMJ85G9QW8sT4eh?tab=summary&timestamp=2002.0)
      - [Engagement data analysis](https://fathom.video/share/ApJiiHCUK6m12cvELmMJ85G9QW8sT4eh?tab=summary&timestamp=1986.0)
4.  Prospect & Engage Accounts
      - [List building](https://fathom.video/share/ApJiiHCUK6m12cvELmMJ85G9QW8sT4eh?tab=summary&timestamp=2042.0)
      - [Multichannel outreach](https://fathom.video/share/ApJiiHCUK6m12cvELmMJ85G9QW8sT4eh?tab=summary&timestamp=2051.0)
5.  Retain & Expand
      - [Customer satisfaction](https://fathom.video/share/ApJiiHCUK6m12cvELmMJ85G9QW8sT4eh?tab=summary&timestamp=2081.0)
      - [Renewal and upsell facilitation](https://fathom.video/share/ApJiiHCUK6m12cvELmMJ85G9QW8sT4eh?tab=summary&timestamp=2101.0)

### Target Audience Priorities

1.  Executive Sales Leadership (primary focus)
2.  Account Executives (AEs)
3.  BDR/SDR Leadership
4.  Customer Success Teams

## Next Steps

  - [Adam to send the presented deck and additional workflow-specific decks (expected by end of week)](https://fathom.video/share/ApJiiHCUK6m12cvELmMJ85G9QW8sT4eh?tab=summary&timestamp=2567.0)
  - [GrowthX team to analyze materials for content strategy development](https://fathom.video/share/ApJiiHCUK6m12cvELmMJ85G9QW8sT4eh?tab=summary&timestamp=2554.0)
  - [Follow up in Slack channel for any additional questions](https://fathom.video/share/ApJiiHCUK6m12cvELmMJ85G9QW8sT4eh?tab=summary&timestamp=2606.0)
  - [Schedule further deep dives on specific topics as needed](https://fathom.video/share/ApJiiHCUK6m12cvELmMJ85G9QW8sT4eh?tab=summary&timestamp=2610.0)
